---
title: "Chip Brock"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: media/chip_c.jpeg
  #image-shape: round
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/raymond-brock-47261919/
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:brockr@msu.edu
---

I'm an experimental particle physicist at Michigan State University and I'm grateful for the U.S. public's 50 years of support for my research. My way of paying you back has been to teaching these subjects---especially to non-science students---and to now I've broadened my audience to you, beyond a classroom.
